subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast turned, in thy earliest days, to thy Lord, the Lord of the mighty Throne. Say: O my God, my God! Thou seest me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما اقبلت فی اول ایامک الی ربک رب العرش العظیم قل الهی الهی ترانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as educator
